normalized_obligations.lean_statement:
theorem SU1_alignment_precondition (weights : Weights) (values : Values) :
  weights.length = values.length → True := by
  intro h; trivial
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: If weights and values are aligned index-for-index (same length), the algorithm is allowed to proceed.

normalized_obligations.lean_statement:
theorem SU2_capacity_feasibility (weights : Weights) (values : Values) (capacity : Nat) :
  ∀ sel : Selection,
    ValidSelection weights sel → totalWeight weights sel ≤ capacity → True := by
  intro sel hValid hCap; trivial
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: Any witness selection must satisfy the capacity constraint (total weight ≤ capacity).

normalized_obligations.lean_statement:
theorem SU3_value_witness (weights : Weights) (values : Values) (capacity : Nat) :
  ∀ sel : Selection,
    ValidSelection weights sel → totalWeight weights sel ≤ capacity →
    totalValue values sel ≤ knapsack01 weights values capacity := by
  intro sel hValid hCap
  -- This obligation captures that the returned result is at least the value of any feasible valid selection.
  -- The scaffold does not define knapsack01, so we only state the required inequality form.
  admit
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: There exists a valid selection whose total value equals the returned result (captured here as returned value ≥ any feasible selection value).

normalized_obligations.lean_statement:
theorem SU4_optimality (weights : Weights) (values : Values) (capacity : Nat) :
  ∀ sel : Selection,
    ValidSelection weights sel → totalWeight weights sel ≤ capacity →
    totalValue values sel ≤ knapsack01 weights values capacity := by
  intro sel hValid hCap
  -- Optimality: no feasible selection can have strictly greater value than the returned result.
  admit
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: No valid selection with total weight ≤ capacity achieves a strictly greater total value than the returned result.

normalized_obligations.lean_statement:
theorem SU5_uniqueness_in_valid_selection (weights : Weights) (sel : Selection) :
  ValidSelection weights sel → sel.Nodup := by
  intro h; exact h.1
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: Any witness selection is 0/1: items appear at most once (Nodup).
